description: Universal pipeline post-separation parity gaps (Yarn, mapping split, lemma heuristics, validation integration)
notes: Created after CONTENT_PIPELINE_SEPARATION closeout to track known SEP-04/SEP-05 gaps without reopening the completed epic.
Prioritize parity and integration work before broadening to new languages.

tasks.desc: Add .yarn source support to universal pipelines/build.py with parity to current .json dialogue build path.
Migrate multi-file POS mapping split/verification logic from legacy scripts into the universal pipeline flow.
Refine KoreanEngine lemma suffix heuristic to avoid incorrect +다 defaults for punctuation/symbol/non-verbal tokens.
Integrate packaging and engine execution validation into a unified command/workflow (documented parity path -> executable path).
